title: Doff Super Strength Weedkiller Sachets 6pk, multi colour
features: PRODUCT INFORMATION: Contains 90g/l Glyphosate. Pre-measured sachet application.
WHAT'S INCLUDED: The box includes 6 Easy to Use Sachets (Each sachet is 80ml). One 80ml sachet can be diluted with water to treat over 30 square metres.
PATH & PATIO WEED KILLER: Keep your path, patio, and drive clean, tidy, and weed-free with these Doff Advanced Concentrated Weed Killer Sachets.

KILLS DOWN TO THE ROOT: This weedkiller formula kills weeds down to the root leaving the surface 100% weed-free! Ideal for annual and deep-rooted perennial weeds such as grasses, docks, nettles, willowherb, dandelion, and many more.
HARMLESS: The product breaks down naturally in the soil to allow replanting.
